mapper.select: SELECT registration.id AS registration_id, registration.patient_id AS patient_user_id, registration.order_no, registration.order_status, registration.created_at, registration.session_id AS clinic_session_id, registration.slot_id AS clinic_slot_id, registration.department_id, department.name AS department_name, registration.doctor_id, user_info.display_name AS doctor_name, session.session_date, session.period_code, registration.fee, registration.cancelled_at, registration.cancellation_reason FROM registration_order registration LEFT JOIN clinic_session session ON session.id = registration.session_id AND session.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN departments department ON department.id = registration.department_id AND department.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN doctors doctor ON doctor.id = registration.doctor_id AND doctor.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN users user_info ON user_info.id = doctor.user_id AND user_info.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE registration.deleted_at IS NULL AND registration.patient_id = #{patientUserId} AND registration.id = #{registrationId}
